Plot:

Faith El Dragon or also known as DRAGON is the infamous mafia heir of the twelve pillars, known for their notoriety. He is currently running companies around the world and gets high investments. In other words, he is a billionaire.

He bought anything. Mansion? Cars? Jets or Helicopters? You name it. He can afford all of that without flinching at the pricetags.. His Father, the Former Heir of the Dragon clan which he currently is the heir of could not help but be more prouder.
